name: Mimolot Academy

ordinary_npc_fabric.summary: Mimolot Academy Innkeeper is the locality-facing innkeeper interface in Mimolot Academy, useful for provides lodging, local gossip, traveler warnings, and emergency favors.
Mimolot Academy Market Clerk is the locality-facing market clerk interface in Mimolot Academy, useful for manages queues, forms, stall assignments, and the practical memory of who came through.
Mimolot Academy Shrine Attendant is the locality-facing shrine attendant interface in Mimolot Academy, useful for maintains offerings, notices breaches, and guides minor local rites.
Mimolot Academy Porter is the locality-facing porter interface in Mimolot Academy, useful for moves freight, luggage, and urgent loads while absorbing gossip from thresholds, yards, and lanes.
Mimolot Academy Scribe is the locality-facing scribe interface in Mimolot Academy, useful for records transactions, testimony, obligations, and quiet corrections that later decide public outcomes.
Mimolot Academy Labor Foreman is the locality-facing labor foreman interface in Mimolot Academy, useful for coordinates shifts, crews, protection, and blame when practical work goes wrong.

street_level_faction_presence.what_they_look_like_in_practice: Authority appears through uniforms, seals, ledgers, ritual markers, escorts, tools, queue control, and which people others make way for.
street_level_faction_presence.who_benefits: Those who know the rules, fulfill obligations, or ride aligned patronage tend to benefit first.
street_level_faction_presence.who_fears_them: Debtors, irregular operators, exposed workers, and those with fragile standing often fear enforcement or scrutiny most.

greetings: Scholarly acknowledgment, titles, and affiliation markers matter.
hospitality_rules: Visitors are often welcomed through procedure: sign-in, sponsorship, reading access, then actual warmth.
insult_triggers: attempting to bypass tariff or catalog rules
taboo_topics: public dismissal of education as wasteful
faith_etiquette: quiet contemplation and respect for study spaces matter more than visible zeal
suspicious_behavior: appearing in archive spaces without proper chain of access
outsider_mistakes: assuming scholarship is neutral rather than political and revenue-linked

ordinary_life_surface.what_people_do_all_day: Instruction, copying, catalog review, tariff administration, debate, and magical training dominate the rhythm of Mimolot life.
ordinary_life_surface.what_places_feel_like: The texture is quieter: paper dust, lamp oil, polished desks, muttered debate, and courier traffic carrying sealed packets.
ordinary_life_surface.home_and_guest_norms: Households keep reading desks, small shrines or reflection corners, secured shelves, and class-marked guest etiquette.

public_rumors: People say something in Mimolot Academy has grown more tense than the officials admit.
Merchants claim the last busy cycle in Mimolot Academy left someone unpaid or publicly embarrassed.
half_true_rumors: A respected local figure in Mimolot Academy is said to be protecting someone they should have exposed.
faction_planted_rumors: A faction-friendly story in Mimolot Academy insists that harsher oversight is the only thing keeping things from collapse.
religious_warnings: Some locals in Mimolot Academy treat current unease as a warning rather than ordinary trouble.
trade_concerns: Freight, labor, or supply movement around Mimolot Academy is said to be more fragile than the ledgers suggest.
criminal_whispers: Quiet talk in Mimolot Academy says favors can still be bought if one knows who keeps the informal door open.
historical_misconceptions: Older residents of Mimolot Academy repeat a version of local history that does not fully match corrective or official accounts.

contradiction_aware_myth_versions.claim: Older residents of Mimolot Academy repeat a version of local history that does not fully match corrective or official accounts.

travel_and_transition_texture.feel: Travelers bound for Mimolot increasingly encounter archive rules, sponsorship expectations, and scrutiny over what they carry and copy.
travel_and_transition_texture.checkpoint_behavior: Checkpoint, gate, dock, or entry custom reveals who is trusted, who is processed, and who is delayed.
travel_and_transition_texture.caravan_or_route_custom: Route handoff norms matter; escorts, seals, witnesses, or weather-reading often determine who moves next.
travel_and_transition_texture.regional_handoff_custom: Responsibility for travelers and goods visibly changes at territorial boundaries.

text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.where_strangers_gather: At the most practical public node: inn bench, queue court, market edge, dock gate, shrine steps, or freight lane.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.public_notice_drawing_attention: A new notice in Mimolot Academy is drawing comment because it changes someone’s movement, cost, or safety.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.visible_tension: People in Mimolot Academy are acting as though a pressure everyone knows about has become harder to ignore.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.private_trouble: Someone respectable in Mimolot Academy is privately entangled in an obligation they cannot publicly explain.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.one_hour_entanglement: A newcomer in Mimolot Academy could be pulled into a dispute, delivery problem, witness request, or rumor test within an hour of arrival.

relationship_and_reputation_consequences.trust: People are remembered for citation discipline, discretion, and whether they use learning to clarify or manipulate.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_causes_good_memory: Keeping one’s word under visible pressure, showing correct public respect, and not creating avoidable trouble.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_causes_bad_memory: Public embarrassment, broken obligations, opportunism during crisis, and forcing others to absorb avoidable risk.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_favors_matter: Timely introductions, queue priority, sealed testimony, repair help, escorting, storage, ritual guidance, and quiet omission when deserved.

scene_starter_inventory: overheard dispute at a public threshold
missing person or missing ledger concern
faction test of loyalty or usefulness
strange celestial sign interpreted three different ways
